ai_summary: Cierra Ames has 3-4 years of experience working with children and is passionate about being a positive role model and creating safe, fun learning environments. Based in Georgia (willing to travel ~30 miles), she prefers morning shifts and brings strong conflict resolution skills to her role with children.
